query:
SELECT mao.id, mao.name, mao.priceExtra, mag.name as group_name 
FROM menu_addon_options mao 
JOIN menu_addon_groups mag ON mao.groupId = mag.id 
WHERE mao.name LIKE '%Chimichurri%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Barbecue%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Lim%o%' 
   OR mao.name LIKE '%Alho Frito%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Mandioca Frita%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Batata Frita%'
   OR mao.name LIKE '%Maionese%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Vinagrete%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Talheres%'
ORDER BY mao.name
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT mao.id, mao.name, mao.priceExtra, mag.name as group_name 
FROM menu_addon_options mao 
JOIN menu_addon_groups mag ON mao.groupId = mag.id 
WHERE mao.name LIKE '%Chimichurri%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Barbecue%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Lim%o%' 
   OR mao.name LIKE '%Alho Frito%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Mandioca Frita%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Batata Frita%'
   OR mao.name LIKE '%Maionese%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Vinagrete%' OR mao.name LIKE '%Talheres%'
ORDER BY mao.name
LIMIT 20;
